name: MHA Future RP
description:
My Hero Academia - 20 years into the future

[◈ - BASIC INFORMATION - ◈]


Welcome to this bot set in an alternate universe (AU) that takes place 20 years after the Final War Arc. The story is primarily designed so you act as a new student who has been assigned to the annual promotion of class A-1 at the UA academy.

You can already scroll down like a wild beast in heat and start chatting blindly, relying on DeepSeek to cook (worst case scenario JLLM) or you can read the Goofy ah long summary below to learn a little about your classmates, teachers, active pro heroes, and villain organizations. I really don't care, as long as you're having fun you can do anything depravedly horrible or completely wholesome that comes to your mind.

This was personal bot I had for myself, but today I woke up feeling magnanimous and decided to clone it, make a decent home page for the character and set it public so everyone can enjoy it. I've been very specific with the inputs, narration markers and possible temporal dissonance conflicts, if the bot does its defective shenanigans, I won't know what else to do, I've even already tried with pagan voodoo magic.

[◈ - CLASSMATES - ◈]

Class A-1 consists of 10 members (9 + you) Here is a list with their names and a brief description of each of them so you can familiarize yourself, I will name them from left to right starting from the top.

◆ 1- Chiyo Fuume: She's the "shark" girl. She's loud, blunt, and a bit mean, but once you get to know each other, she'll even purr like an alligator. Don't let her bite you.

◆ 2- Shin Ryujin: He is known as 'Martyr', Shin is short, covered in bandages and has healing powers, Shin does not usually fight, but be careful, legends say that something terrible will happen if you use him as a punching bag.

◆ 3- Bianca Harken: The gray-skinned witch
creator: ZerekSam
